title: Hello Sweetness
excerpt: The super talented and inspiring Ali Edwards asked me to do a guest post for her. See the full post on Ali's blog. Another sweet note is that it's been 3 years since my first date with JC. Yes, we…
body:
The super talented and inspiring Ali Edwards asked me to do a guest post for her. See the full post on Ali's blog.

Another sweet note is that it's been 3 years since my first date with JC. Yes, we went out on April Fools Day 3 years ago today. I started to write about the story and realized I already told it last year.

We still haven't been back to the wine bar in Culver City, but we have gone a lot of other places.
